name: navbar
description: A responsive site header: a brand lockup, a row of navigation links and up to two actions, collapsing to a hamburger-toggled panel on mobile. Sticky with a blurred backdrop by default. The mobile panel's height motion collapses to an instant toggle under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a header with a labelled nav for the primary links; the mobile disclosure button carries aria-expanded and aria-controls, and its panel is a second labelled nav that mounts on open
The brand can be wrapped in a link; CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons, so each is keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible
The hamburger button has an accessible name that reflects the open/closed state
Built on the ibirdui button styles; the panel animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a site header / navigation bar for a landing page
a responsive navbar with a mobile hamburger menu
a sticky top navigation built on ibirdui
examples: <Navbar brand={<Logo />} links={[{ label: 'Catalogue', href: '/catalogue' }]} primaryAction={{ label: 'Get started', href: '/docs' }} />
